message:
fix(safety,stability): 8 review findings across scoring, deletion, PID, EWMA, PAL, bootstrap, guardrails

Scoring: add 9 missing system path vetoes (/dev,/home,/lib,/lib64,/opt,/root,/run,/snap,/var),
  cap delete_advantage_ratio at 1e6 to avoid f64::INFINITY in JSON serialization.
Deletion: reject symlinks in preflight (remove_dir_all follows symlinks into targets),
  use symlink_metadata instead of path.exists().
PID: reset integral accumulator and last_update on target change to prevent stale state
  after config reload switches from yellow to green threshold.
EWMA: fix numerical cancellation in project_time for negative acceleration using
  conjugate multiplication (2*distance/(rate+root)), reject unphysical roots past t_zero.
PAL: skip malformed /proc/self/mounts lines instead of failing entire parse.
Daemon: use green_min_free_pct (not yellow) for PID target on config reload, matching init.
Bootstrap: fix ExecStart "daemon run" → "daemon", fix plist replacing all <string> entries
  instead of just binary path, fix permissions 0o755 → 0o111 (add execute only).
Guardrails: add upper clamp (50.0) to e_process_log to prevent unbounded accumulation
  making guard impossible to trip after long good-observation streaks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
